  1. recoder.java.declaration
  2. MethodDeclaration

Uses of Class
recoder.java.declaration.MethodDeclaration

Packages that use MethodDeclaration
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl
RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.pattern
This package contains classes that model design patterns; it is far from being stable and will be subject to changes.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IProgramMethod
    Recoder2KeYConverter.convert(MethodDeclaration md)
    convert a recoder MethodDeclaration to a KeY IProgramMethod (especially the declaration type of its parent is determined and handed over)

    wraps a RECODER MethodDeclaration in a class

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MethodDeclaration
    MethodKit.cloneHeader(MethodDeclaration md)
    Returns a deep clone of the header of the given declaration; the body of the result is null.
    static MethodDeclaration
    MethodKit.createAbstractMethodDeclaration(MethodDeclaration decl, boolean forInterface)
    Deprecated.
    not tested
    static MethodDeclaration
    MethodKit.createAdapterMethod(ReferencePrefix delegationObject, MethodDeclaration method)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<MethodDeclaration>
    MethodKit.getGetters(SourceInfo si, FieldSpecification f)
    Query that tries to identify getter methods for the given field within the class declaration of the given field.
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type MethodDeclaration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ParameterDeclaration child, MethodDeclaration parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Throws child, MethodDeclaration parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static Problem
    MethodKit.checkMethodDeclaration(NameInfo ni, SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration context, MethodDeclaration candidate)
    Query that finds out problems before inserting a new method declaration.
    static MethodDeclaration
    MethodKit.cloneHeader(MethodDeclaration md)
    Returns a deep clone of the header of the given declaration; the body of the result is null.
    static MethodDeclaration

    Deprecated.
    not tested
    static MethodDeclaration
    MethodKit.createAdapterMethod(ReferencePrefix delegationObject, MethodDeclaration method)
    Create a simple adapter method for a method declaration.
    static DocComment
    CommentKit.createDoc(MethodDeclaration method, boolean dummy)
    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given method declaration.
    static MethodReference
    MethodKit.createMethodReference(MethodDeclaration decl)
    Makes a method reference to the method declaration with the same actual argument names as in the declaration.
    static MethodReference
    MethodKit.createMethodReference(ReferencePrefix prefix, MethodDeclaration decl)
    makes a method reference to the method declaration with the same actual argument names as in the declaration.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ParameterDeclaration child, MethodDeclaration parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Throws child, MethodDeclaration parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(TypeReference child, MethodDeclaration parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(StatementBlock child, MethodDeclaration parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static boolean
    MethodKit.rename(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, MethodDeclaration method, String newName)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenameMethod
